_readme.purpose: Controls thresholds for the Tier 1 auto health check (cleanup.sh). Update lastCleanup after every manual deep clean. Update trackedFiles when adding new knowledge/ or .brain/ docs.
_readme.whenToUse: Only touch this file during Tier 3 manual cleanup. Follow .brain/how-to/repo-cleanup/CONTEXT.md — it tells you exactly what to do. The auto script (.brain/cleanup/cleanup.sh) reads staleDaysThreshold and maxFileSizeKB automatically via jq. After cleanup: set lastCleanup to today, update trackedFiles if files changed, then re-run the script to verify 0 warnings.

fields.lastCleanup: ISO date of last manual deep cleanup (Tier 3). Update this after running how-to/repo-cleanup/.
fields.staleDaysThreshold: Files not modified in this many days are flagged as orphan candidates.
fields.maxFileSizeKB: Warn if any file in these paths exceeds the KB limit.
fields.trackedFiles: Files that should always exist and stay current. Cleanup script warns if missing or oversize.
fields.archiveThreshold: When to trim session-log.md and move old files to .brain/archive/.

94-knowledge/design-system.md.purpose: design rules — load before any new view

94-knowledge/architecture.md.purpose: code rules, theme tokens, component patterns

.brain/current-state.md.purpose: session state — where we left off

.brain/whats-left.md.purpose: everything still to build or wire
